source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task46_') AS OLE_DB_Source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task46_') AS OLE_DB_Source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task46__sink_TableName;
SELECT * ,GETDATE() AS Import_Date,CAST(APP_CIO as VARCHAR) AS {Derived Column 1} FROM DBO.VW_VULN_SERVER_OWNERRELATIONSHIP
